title: Workspace Context Router Family
goal: Implement #453 by presenting start, summary, report, defaults, and preflight as one context-router family in docs and compact output labels.
non_goals: Do not break or rename existing commands.
Do not add a new first-contact surface.
Do not create a larger command taxonomy.

intent.outcome: Agents can choose the right compact context-router view without treating each command as a separate product layer.
intent.constraints: Keep existing commands and startup compact; no new first-contact surface.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest docs/output labels that make the shared family visible.
intent.escalation: Escalate if consolidation requires command behavior changes or new lifecycle machinery.

execution.next_step: Inspect README, AGENTS.md, docs/contributor-playbook.md, start/report/defaults/preflight labels, and #453 acceptance criteria.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, proof selector, planning doctor, and adapter-surface refresh if startup docs change

invariants: No new first-contact surface is added.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #454-#460 plus #467/#469/#471 remain in the feature-tier and surface-merge lane.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #453 closeout, promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Merge compact context commands into a context-router family.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not add a new first-contact surface or break existing commands.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which docs/output labels carry the shared family concept.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The change needs behavioral command consolidation rather than docs/output compression.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Make compact commands feel like one small router, not several product concepts.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can an agent pick the right context view without reading a separate handbook?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Inspect README, AGENTS.md, docs/contributor-playbook.md, start/report/defaults/preflight labels, and #453 acceptance criteria.
invariants: No new first-contact surface is added.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-context-router-family.plan.json README.md AGENTS.md docs/contributor-playbook.md src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Docs describe start, summary, report, defaults, and preflight as one context-router family.
Agents can choose the right view without treating each command as a separate product layer.
No new first-contact surface is added.
drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted from TODO direct-task shape into an execplan.
